ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the stock exchange */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the stock exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used by the stock exchange */,
  "mic_code" TEXT /* MIC code of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listed_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the company is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listed_companies_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close_price" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price index record */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price index record */,
  "index_value" TEXT /* Value of the stock price index on the given date */,
  "dividend_yield" TEXT /* Dividend yield of the stock price index on the given date */,
  "price_to_earnings_ratio" TEXT /* Price to earnings ratio of the stock price index on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_indices_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, trader) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard (e.g., 1-column, 2-column) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard that the chart belongs to */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that the chart is displaying data for */,
  "date_range" TEXT /* Date range of the chart (e.g., 1-day, 1-week) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price alert, volume alert) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that the alert is for */,
  "threshold" TEXT /* Threshold value for the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the trade */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that the trade is for */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the trade */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the trade */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade history record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the trade history */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "profit_loss" TEXT /* Profit or loss of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk management record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the risk management record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that the risk management record is for */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "stop_loss" TEXT /* Stop loss value for the risk management record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate record */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency of the exchange rate */,
  "quote_currency" TEXT /* Quote currency of the exchange rate */,
  "rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate value */,
  "rate_date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that the dividend is for */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend payment */,
  "dividend_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the dividend payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("company_id")
)
